text:
Comment on attachment 211206
geary.patch (3.35.2)

>--- a/mail/geary/Makefile
>+++ b/mail/geary/Makefile
>@@ -2,8 +2,7 @@
> # $FreeBSD$

> PORTNAME=	geary
>-PORTVERSION=	0.13.3
>-PORTREVISION=	1
>+PORTVERSION=	3.35.2

> MASTER_SITES=	GNOME

Is there any reason that you prefer unstable releases (3.35.x) to stable releases (3.34.x)?
